'''zarate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:zummut|zummut]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| z-r-g
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:zummut|zummut]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| zarate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:zarate|zarate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:zaratesher|zaratesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zaratesherĂ«m|zaratesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:zaratero|zaratero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:zarateshĂ«|zarateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zarateshĂ«m|zarateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokizaratero|gokizaratero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokizarateshĂ«|gokizarateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizarateshĂ«m|gokizarateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gozarankerom|gozarankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozarankeshĂ«|gozarankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozarankeshĂ«m|gozarankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gozarankeya|gozarankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:zaraterom|zaraterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zaratemu|zaratemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:zarateya|zarateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokizaraterom|gokizaraterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizaratemu|gokizaratemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokizarateya|gokizarateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:zararate|zararate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:zararatesher|zararatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zararatesherĂ«m|zararatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:zararatero|zararatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:zararateshĂ«|zararateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zararateshĂ«m|zararateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokizararatero|gokizararatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokizararateshĂ«|gokizararateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizararateshĂ«m|gokizararateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gozararankerom|gozararankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozararankeshĂ«|gozararankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozararankeshĂ«m|gozararankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gozararankeya|gozararankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:zararaterom|zararaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zararatemu|zararatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:zararateya|zararateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokizararaterom|gokizararaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizararatemu|gokizararatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokizararateya|gokizararateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:zĂŠrĂŠte|zĂŠrĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:zĂŠrĂŠtesher|zĂŠrĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zĂŠrĂŠtesherĂ«m|zĂŠrĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:zĂŠrĂŠtero|zĂŠrĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:zĂŠrĂŠteshĂ«|zĂŠrĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zĂŠrĂŠteshĂ«m|zĂŠrĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokizĂŠrĂŠtero|gokizĂŠrĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokizĂŠrĂŠteshĂ«|gokizĂŠrĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizĂŠrĂŠteshĂ«m|gokizĂŠrĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gozĂŠrĂŠnkerom|gozĂŠrĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozĂŠrĂŠnkeshĂ«|gozĂŠrĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozĂŠrĂŠnkeshĂ«m|gozĂŠrĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gozĂŠrĂŠnkeya|gozĂŠrĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:zĂŠrĂŠterom|zĂŠrĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zĂŠrĂŠtemu|zĂŠrĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:zĂŠrĂŠteya|zĂŠrĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokizĂŠrĂŠterom|gokizĂŠrĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizĂŠrĂŠtemu|gokizĂŠrĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokizĂŠrĂŠteya|gokizĂŠrĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:zafrafte|zafrafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:zafraftesher|zafraftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zafraftesherĂ«m|zafraftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:zafraftero|zafraftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:zafrafteshĂ«|zafrafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zafrafteshĂ«m|zafrafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokizafraftero|gokizafraftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokizafrafteshĂ«|gokizafrafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizafrafteshĂ«m|gokizafrafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gozafrafnkerom|gozafrafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozafrafnkeshĂ«|gozafrafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozafrafnkeshĂ«m|gozafrafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gozafrafnkeya|gozafrafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:zafrafterom|zafrafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zafraftemu|zafraftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:zafrafteya|zafrafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokizafrafterom|gokizafrafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizafraftemu|gokizafraftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokizafrafteya|gokizafrafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
